history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian person with black hair and glasses stands in front of a concrete wall and lush green bushes. They are wearing a light-colored, checkered short-sleeved button-up shirt over a long-sleeved white t-shirt. Their bottoms are light-wash denim shorts with a frayed hem. They have white socks and brown clogs on their feet. A denim tote bag with a cartoonish graphic is slung over their right shoulder. A keychain with several keys hangs from their shorts. The background features a wooden utility pole to the left and a building with arched windows and awnings behind the foliage. The sky above is filled with dramatic, cloudy gray and blue tones. The lighting suggests it is late afternoon or early evening, with soft shadows and a slightly overcast sky creating a natural, relaxed atmosphere. The overall color palette is muted with greens, grays, blues, and the natural tones of the person's outfit. The mood is casual and serene.
